subcodes.first_line: All things on this Day are engaged in glorification and praise of the Lord of Names, uttering His remembrance, yet the servants remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اشیا الیوم بتسبیح و تحمید مالک اسما ناطق و ذاکرند و مع ذلک عباد غافل
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @praise and encouragement
